# Ensign Ai Marketing Agency

> Saudi-based AI and marketing consultancy designing intelligent marketing systems, automation frameworks, and high-performance campaigns. Based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, serving businesses across KSA and the UAE.

## About

Ensign Ai Marketing Agency is a Riyadh-based AI marketing consultancy that combines artificial intelligence with strategic human leadership to build modern marketing systems for businesses in Saudi Arabia and the Gulf region. The agency specializes in marketing automation, AI agent deployment, campaign execution, and creative production powered by AI.

- Founded in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
- Tagline: "AI Systems. Human Leadership."
- Contact: contact@ensignksa.com
- Phone/WhatsApp: +966 54 891 9405
- Working Hours: Sunday to Thursday, 9:00 AM — 6:00 PM (Saudi time)
- Booking: https://cal.eu/ensignksa/30min

## Services

- [AI & Marketing Advisory](https://ensignksa.com/#services): Strategic AI and marketing consulting — market positioning, AI readiness assessments, and growth planning
- [AI Agents & Automation](https://ensignksa.com/#services): Custom AI agents for lead qualification, CRM automation, chatbot deployment, and workflow optimization
- [Marketing Systems](https://ensignksa.com/#services): End-to-end marketing infrastructure — CRM setup, funnel design, analytics dashboards, and reporting automation
- [Campaign Execution](https://ensignksa.com/#services): Performance marketing across Google Ads, Meta, TikTok, Snapchat, and LinkedIn with AI-driven optimization
- [Creative Production](https://ensignksa.com/#services): AI-enhanced content creation — video, graphics, copywriting, and brand identity
- [Entertainment & Event Management](https://ensignksa.com/#services): End-to-end event planning, entertainment booking, and live production services

## Industries Served

Real Estate & PropTech, Healthcare & MedTech, Hospitality & Tourism, E-commerce & Retail, Entertainment & Events, Finance & Fintech, Education & EdTech

## Blog

- [What Is an AI Marketing Agency, and Why Saudi Businesses Are Switching](https://ensignksa.com/blog/what-is-ai-marketing-agency-saudi-arabia.html): Complete guide to what an AI marketing agency does, how it differs from traditional agencies, the three pillars (AI strategy, automated execution, intelligent optimization), and why Saudi businesses are making the switch in 2026
- [In-House Marketing vs AI Agency: What Saudi SMEs Need to Know](https://ensignksa.com/blog/in-house-marketing-vs-ai-agency-saudi-smes.html): Cost and capability comparison between hiring an in-house marketing team vs partnering with an AI-powered agency in Saudi Arabia
- [5 AI Marketing Automations Every Saudi Business Should Use in 2026](https://ensignksa.com/blog/ai-marketing-automations-saudi-business-2026.html): How Saudi businesses can use AI-powered automations for lead capture, CRM, ad optimization, content, and reporting

## Key Facts

- Operates in Saudi Arabia (Riyadh) and UAE
- Bilingual: English and Arabic
- Serves SMEs, startups, and enterprises
- Focus areas: AI marketing, marketing automation, AI agents, campaign management, creative production
- Currencies accepted: SAR, AED, USD
